name: American Express Platinum Card

rewards.displayRate: 1 Membership Rewards Point / Rs 40 spent on eligible categories
3 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 40 spent on overseas spends
5 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 100 spent on fuel
Up to 20X Membership Rewards points on select online and in-store brands listed by American Express

domestic: Global Lounge Collection includes domestic partner lounges in India.
international: Global Lounge Collection includes Priority Pass lounges, The Centurion Lounge, Delta Sky Club when flying Delta, and Escape lounges.

exclusions: excluded spends as per American Express Platinum Card terms
joiningBenefits: Welcome gift worth up to Rs 60,000 on payment of annual fee and spending Rs 50,000 within the first 2 months of Cardmembership
milestoneBenefits: Renewal benefit worth up to Rs 35,000 voucher on spending Rs 20 lakh in the membership year and payment of renewal fee
additionalBenefits: Fine Hotels & Resorts and The Hotel Collection stay benefits listed by American Express
Complimentary memberships including Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite, Hilton Honors Gold, Radisson Rewards Premium, ALL Accor Plus Explorer, The Postcard Hotel Sunshine Club, and EazyDiner Prime
Exclusive airline deals through Platinum Travel Service

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 Membership Rewards point -> 1 Marriott Bonvoy point

salaried: Employed with personal annual income of Rs 25 lakh and above
Good credit history with no payment defaults
Resident Indian with current residential address in India
selfEmployed: Self-employed with personal annual income of Rs 15 lakh and above
Company has been trading for more than 12 months
Resident Indian with current residential address in India

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
The welcome gift is fulfilled within 6-8 weeks after payment of annual fee and net spends of Rs 50,000 in the first 2 months of Cardmembership.
Fuel earns 1 Membership Rewards point per Rs 100 spent plus 4 additional bonus Membership Rewards points per Rs 100 spent, capped at 5,000 bonus points per calendar month.

Reward Xcelerator on Platinum is presented by American Express as an up to 20X earn benefit on select partner brands rather than a universal online earn rate; the exact multiplier depends on the partner offer.
Membership Rewards points on the Platinum Card do not expire.
